intro: Our recent coverage of espionage activity from April 12 to 15, 2026, details five incidents, all rated high or critical in severity. The threat actor APT28 (Fancy Bear) was prominently featured in this reporting. The operations had a global reach, with specific focus on Ukraine, and targeted a range of critical sectors. These included government agencies, healthcare, technology firms, defense contractors, and large enterprise networks. The collected intelligence underscores a concentrated period of sophisticated cyber espionage against these vital industries.
